positive: A detailed, epic fantasy illustration of a steampunk airship sailing through a cloudy, mountainous sky. The ship is powered by glowing brass mechanisms and features intricate rivets and Victorian elements. Cinematic lighting, concept art style, dramatic depth of field, highly rendered.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, watercolor, childish, simple
